01-plain-html.title: Plain HTML + CSS (baseline)
01-plain-html.note: Hand-rolled, system fonts, no framework, no JS. The naive 'just emit HTML' genUI output — and roughly what rustra-ui ships today.

02-v0-shadcn.title: v0 · shadcn/ui + Tailwind (static)
02-v0-shadcn.note: Vercel v0's output stack, rendered statically (SSR'd HTML + purged Tailwind, no client framework to paint). Neutral shadcn design tokens, no brand accent.

03-react-genui.title: React genUI (Crayon / tambo / AI Elements)
03-react-genui.note: Client-rendered React: a canned spec hydrated in the browser with the real React runtime inlined. Shared render-cost profile of Thesys C1/Crayon, tambo, Vercel AI SDK + AI Elements, and assistant-ui.
